title: AI in higher ed: just like the shock of the Internet and the web?
abstract:
AI in Higher Ed: Just Like the Shock of the Internet and Web?
Are you ready for an AI education tool that’s as disruptive as when internet speeds skyrocketed and computers became a household item? Welcome to this wave that's transforming classrooms, making learning exciting and engaging. Dive in and see how AI can enrich your educational experience!
abstract_zh:
AI 在教育界：就像互联网和网页的冲击一样？
你是不是觉得 AI 教育工具的到来，就像是当年网速飙升、电脑普及到家时的那种震撼？没错！这股浪潮正汹涌而来，让课堂从此不枯燥。快来体验吧，让你的学习生活充满新奇与乐趣！
